'''Sep Elopon''' held the sixth orbital position in the [[Mon Calamari system/Legends|Calamari system]]. It was a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] with a beautiful system of rings and was also orbited by 32 [[Moon/Legends|moons]]. It was used as a [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] staging area during the [[Defense of Mon Calamari (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Defense of Mon Calamari]].
